name: rad-context-prompter
description:
Reverse-engineer, write, and migrate AI prompts. The prompt-decompiler skill routes between six modes — anatomize, translate, compress, decompose, forensics, diagnose — on prompts you paste in. The prompt-engineering skill covers writing patterns and platform-specific shape (Claude, GPT, Gemini, image generators, agentic tools). An autonomous prompt-debugger agent handles prompt-output failure analysis.

Bundled `scripts/lint-prompt.py` is a pure-stdlib Python linter that mechanically detects common prompt-engineering issues: missing role/system frame, vague instructions ("make it better", "be helpful"), unbounded length adjectives ("concise" with no limit), subjective quality claims, conflicting output formats (JSON + markdown), missing examples after few-shot intent, excessive YOU MUST / ALWAYS / NEVER emphasis, superhuman-role framing ("world-class expert"), and imperative collisions (same verb both demanded and forbidden). Reads prompts from file or stdin; emits JSON or human-readable findings.
